subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-05-07
subcodes.first_line: I have come from the Orient to visit your country. Surely this continent is praiseworthy
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @harmony of science and religion, @oneness; unity of religion, @wealth inequality and its moderation, @universal education, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @The Holy Spirit, @unity; oneness of humanity
